Description: Firewalls: To make sure that only secure and necessary network services can be accessed from the internet.
Relevant SCG Controls: esx-9.firewall-restrict-access, nsx-9.ibgp-source-loopback, nsx-9.reverse-path-forwarding, operations-9.firewall-hardening, vcenter-9.network-mac-learning, vcenter-9.network-reject-forged-transmit-dvportgroup, vcenter-9.network-reject-mac-changes-dvportgroup, vcenter-9.network-reset-port, vcenter-9.network-restrict-netflow-usage, vcenter-9.network-restrict-port-level-overrides, vcenter-9.network-restrict-port-mirroring, vcenter-9.vami-firewall-restrict-access, vsan-9.hcl-internet, vsan-9.network-isolation-vsan-iscsi-target

Description: Secure configuration: Ensure that computers and network devices are properly configured to reduce vulnerabilities and provide only the services required to fulfil their role.
Relevant SCG Controls: automation-9.oidc-settings, automation-9.timeouts, fleet-9.access-token, fleet-9.api-token, sddc-9.basic-auth-disable, vcf-9.mfa, vcf-9.secure-baseline

Description: Security update management: Ensure that devices and software are not vulnerable to known security issues for which fixes are available.
Malware protection: To restrict execution of known malware and untrusted software, from causing damage or accessing data.
Relevant SCG Controls: esx-9.hardware-firmware-updates, esx-9.updates, guest-9.tools-updates, guest-9.tools-upgrade, vcenter-9.vami-updates, vm-9.virtual-hardware
